title: Master v0.4.1 Discord Webhook Notifications
notes:
Adds Discord webhook notification settings and alerts for Master actions like approvals, rejections, backups, access changes, policy changes, and version-control changes.

Changes:
- Adds Discord Notifications card to Master Panel.
- Adds Discord Notifications page.
- Saves Discord webhook URL locally.
- Loads Discord notification settings.
- Clears saved webhook.
- Sends test Discord webhook message.
- Sends alert when a submission is approved/merged.
- Sends alert when a submission is rejected.
- Sends alert when a backup is created.
- Sends alert when access account/temp key data changes.
- Sends alert when Discord/device policies change.
- Sends alert when version control changes.

Discord setup:
1. Discord server > Channel Settings > Integrations > Webhooks
2. Create webhook
3. Copy webhook URL
4. Paste into Master > Discord Notifications
5. Check Enable Discord notifications
6. Save Discord Settings
7. Send Test Message

Security:
- The webhook URL is saved locally in Master app data.
- Do not share a Master build with your webhook already saved.
